summary: I am a Full Stack Developer focused on building complete web applications — from accessible, high-performance interfaces to scalable REST APIs and relational databases. I work with React, TypeScript, Node.js, Express and PostgreSQL, developing SPAs that consume and serve REST APIs with a focus on performance, best practices and user experience. I'm interested in writing clean, testable and scalable code, applying screaming architecture principles, efficient state management and data validation.

echolog.name: EchoLog
echolog.short: Multi-tenant customer feedback SaaS — boards, upvoting, comments, workspace management. Full-stack TypeScript with React 19, Node.js, Express, PostgreSQL.
echolog.whatILearned: Screaming architecture on the backend, cross-origin JWT auth, multi-tenant isolation with composite keys, WCAG 2.1 AA compliance. (Details in the case study)

movie-dashboard.name: Movie Management Dashboard
movie-dashboard.short: SPA dashboard to manage movie catalog. CRUD, Supabase authentication, React Query (cache, fetching), forms and tests. Built with React, TypeScript and Vite; focus on security, UX and modular architecture.
movie-dashboard.whatILearned: Supabase RLS configuration, react-query cache management and testing strategies for stateful CRUD apps. (Details in the case study)

cinelab.name: CineLab
cinelab.short: Movie Search App — search, filters, persistent favorites and dynamic recommendations (TMDB). Built with React, TypeScript and Vite; focus on performance and UX.
cinelab.whatILearned: Image optimization, cache handling, hooks architecture and UI testing. (Details in the case study)

chefcitoia.name: ChefcitoIA
chefcitoia.short: AI recipe generator that turns ingredients and constraints into practical meal ideas. Built with React, TypeScript and Vite; focus on validation and reliable request handling.
chefcitoia.whatILearned: Zod-backed validation, payload mapping safety and abortable requests to avoid stale results. (Details in the case study)
